notes: Auto-accepted machine draft without manual confirmation. Replace with manually verified values when needed.

fields.tuition: Hong Kong Government's Continuing Education Fund (CEF) is for Hong Kong residents. Eligible students can apply for reimbursement of up to HK$25,000. The MSc Program in Data-Driven Modeling has been included in the list of reimbursable courses under Continuing Education Fund with the QR number 19/000920/L6. All courses of the Program are recognized under the Qualifications Framework (QF Level 6).
fields.english_requirement: Applicants have to fulfill English Language requirements with one of the following proficiency attainments: First Column Text Area
fields.academic_requirement: Applicants seeking admission to a master's degree program should have obtained a bachelor's degree from a recognized institution, or an approved equivalent qualification.
